# download_eunomia_data { #cdmconnector.download_eunomia_data }

```python
download_eunomia_data(
    dataset_name='GiBleed',
    cdm_version='5.4',
    path=None,
    overwrite=False,
)
```

Download Eunomia data from CDMConnector blob storage (or GitHub for Synthea27NjParquet).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                | Description                                                     | Default     |
|--------------|---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|-------------|
| dataset_name | str                 | One of example_datasets() (default "GiBleed").                  | `'GiBleed'` |
| cdm_version  | str                 | "5.3" or "5.4" (default "5.4").                                 | `'5.4'`     |
| path         | str or Path or None | Directory to save the ZIP; default EUNOMIA_DATA_FOLDER env var. | `None`      |
| overwrite    | bool                | If True, overwrite existing ZIP (default False).                | `False`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                 |
|--------|--------|---------------------------------------------|
|        | str    | Path to the directory where data is stored. |
